chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D - 146 of 2021 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 30.08.2023 Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned AAG Sindh has filed statement on behalf of Respondent No.3, which is taken on record and submits compliance has been made and petitioner has been appointed as Junior Elementary School Teacher (JEST), therefore, this petition has served its purpose. Accordingly, the petition is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI
